name: Kazakh Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the ground lamb, slivered almonds, fruits, chopped onion, salt, and minced garlic.
2. Cook the rice until nearly done. Add vegetable oil to the rice as it cooks. Do not drain any liquid.
3. Incorporate the lamb mixture into the cooked rice and finish cooking.
4. Serve as a side dish or main course. This is an easy and palate-pleasing dish.
ORIGIN: Chef Pyotr Numurdaleshev, Kazakh Aul Restaurant, Almaty, Kazakhstan
